import Style from "./Header.module.css" import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from "../../context/AuthContext"; export default function Header(){ const navs = useNavigate(); const { userInfo } = useAuth(); console.log(userInfo) return(

{navs("/")}}>Messenger

{userInfo?.id ?
